query: SELECT tier, slot, COUNT(*) as cnt, MIN(atk_bonus+def_bonus+hp_bonus+spd_bonus+matk_bonus+mp_bonus) as min_total, MAX(atk_bonus+def_bonus+hp_bonus+spd_bonus+matk_bonus+mp_bonus) as max_total, AVG(atk_bonus) as avg_atk, AVG(def_bonus) as avg_def, AVG(hp_bonus) as avg_hp, AVG(spd_bonus) as avg_spd FROM equipment_templates GROUP BY tier, slot ORDER BY FIELD(tier,'basic','intermediate','advanced','legendary'), slot;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user PS8xt1zjvuRpYHF.3bd331015af6 --database MLF7bLVZzzxdGTPVXTct3c --execute SELECT tier, slot, COUNT(*) as cnt, MIN(atk_bonus+def_bonus+hp_bonus+spd_bonus+matk_bonus+mp_bonus) as min_total, MAX(atk_bonus+def_bonus+hp_bonus+spd_bonus+matk_bonus+mp_bonus) as max_total, AVG(atk_bonus) as avg_atk, AVG(def_bonus) as avg_def, AVG(hp_bonus) as avg_hp, AVG(spd_bonus) as avg_spd FROM equipment_templates GROUP BY tier, slot ORDER BY FIELD(tier,'basic','intermediate','advanced','legendary'), slot;
